fix: move workflow to repo root .github/workflows/ and set working-directory

GitHub Actions requires workflows at the repository root, not in subdirectories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: create Symfony .env file on first launch before composer install

Symfony's post-install cache:clear script requires a .env file to exist.
On a fresh clone, app/.env is gitignored and missing, causing composer
install to fail with a PathException. The entrypoint now creates a
minimal .env before running composer install.

skip the changelog requirement and get auto-marked as pre-releases.

commit.message:
fix: use decodeFromConstraints to trigger camera permission prompt in Firefox

listVideoInputDevices returns empty before permission is granted, causing the
scanner to immediately show the no_camera error state. Switching to
decodeFromConstraints with facingMode: environment lets the browser prompt
for permission first, and also selects the rear camera on mobile automatically.

commit.message:
Add dynamical systems analysis: fixed points and phase portrait

- dynamics.py (new module): find_fixed_points() detects fixed points of
  the empirical velocity field via local speed minima + fsolve refinement,
  classifies each by Jacobian eigenvalues (stable/unstable node, saddle,
  stable/unstable spiral, center)
- plotting.py: plot_phase_portrait() renders KDE density + streamlines +
  colour-coded nullclines + typed fixed-point markers in one figure
- __init__.py: expose dynamics module as nt_dyn
- Notebook: fixed-point detection + phase portrait grid in both whole-brain
  (sec 4.3) and within-ROI (sec 5.3) sections

Fix zero-trades issue: loosen stacked entry filters

- RSI thresholds: 55/45 -> 60/40 (tighter extreme = more stable bias)
- bos_expire_bars: 20 -> 48 (12hr window for retrace)
- Pending cancel: only on RSI cross of 50, not any bias wobble

commit.message:
Fix image bot road trip: use per-bot delay, derive states from geospatial data

road-trip.js: image bots now use bot.delayBetweenImageFetches (not a
hardcoded 2s) with count capped so total capture time matches the video
duration. Slow-refresh cameras (60s+) will capture too few unique images
and be soft-skipped via the uniqueImageCount < 2 check.

fetch-highway-routes.js: when fetching a highway that has no highways.json
entry yet (or --force), now determines the ordered state list by sampling
~20 points along the route and reverse geocoding via Nominatim, and computes
miles from the route geometry. Writes the result back to highways.json so
new highways no longer need to be manually curated.

highways.json: reverted the 8 manually-added entries (I-22, I-44, I-68,
I-78, I-82, I-83, I-89, I-93). Run fetch-highway-routes.js with those
highway names on the Pi to generate them correctly from OSM data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: ClassicTraffic
repository.description: Posts videos of state traffic cameras 🚗

commit.message:
V6.0: STRATHMARK becomes the authoritative handicap engine

STRATHEX now calls STRATHMARK for all handicap calculation, Monte Carlo
simulation, and fairness assessment. STRATHMARK is installed in editable
mode so any improvement to the engine is immediately available on next run.

Key changes:
- woodchopping/handicaps/calculator.py: thin wrapper around HandicapCalculator
- woodchopping/simulation/monte_carlo.py: proxy to strathmark.variance
- woodchopping/simulation/fairness.py: proxy to strathmark.fairness
- woodchopping/strathmark_adapter.py: DataFrame <-> STRATHMARK typed objects
- woodchopping/data/store_registry.py: module-level ResultStore singleton
- woodchopping/data/excel_io.py: dual-write results to SQLite ResultStore
- MainProgramV5_2.py: initialize ResultStore + migrate Excel history on startup

SQLite persistence at ~/.strathmark/results.db accumulates tournament
results across competitions for progressively more accurate predictions.

v5.2-legacy branch preserves the pure-local V5.2 implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: grip_fail 後に CLOSE コマンドが繰り返し送信される問題を修正

robot_control が 50ms 毎に hand_control を送信するため、
hwmc は GRIP_FAIL 状態でも CLOSE 条件が成立し CAN コマンドを送り続けていた。
GRIP_FAIL を終端状態として扱い CLOSE コマンドを送らないようにする。

commit.message:
Fix worker queue blocking: timeouts, no retries, longer lock duration

- Remove 3-attempt retries — bad jobs fail once and clear the queue immediately
- Add 3-minute hard timeout per job via Promise.race
- Set lockDuration=5min + lockRenewTime=60s to prevent stall re-queuing
- This fixes: mobile job hangs → blocks all subsequent web submissions

feat: MMS photo intake — callers reply with job site photos after intake

After Maria completes a call with intake data, the caller gets a text
asking for photos of the job site. Photos are matched to the intake,
attached to the job card, and the owner is notified. Dramatically
increases lead quality for estimate accuracy.

- Migration 0051: intake_attachments table + job_cards photo_count column
- Photo request service: bilingual SMS sent 2 min after call ends
- Inbound photo handler: matches MMS to recent intakes within 48h window
- Twilio webhook: MMS detection before owner reply + existing handlers
- Dashboard: photo gallery in job card detail with lazy-loaded thumbnails
- Daily digest: photo counts shown in lead summaries (SMS + email)
- Admin: total photos stat in job cards tab
- Images only (jpeg/png/gif/webp/heic) — video skipped for MVP
- Uses Twilio-hosted URLs directly — stored_url column for future storage

commit.message:
feat: auto-populate tasks in newly generated fiscal year boards

When generateFiscalYearBoards creates new monthly boards, it now
automatically copies tasks from the most recent previous board that
has task instances. This ensures recurring tasks (like PNL reviews)
appear in new boards without requiring the previous board to be
marked as complete.

Also adds seed script for TMG Construction PNL review tasks
(Jan 2023 - Mar 2026).

fix: set PYTHONPATH and CUDA_ARCH env before agent run_shell

Agent's run_shell inherits process env, but PYTHONPATH (for optest)
and UNIOPBENCH_TASK_CUDA_ARCH were only set in subprocess_env() for
orchestrator's own run_command() calls. Now set them in os.environ
inside run_agent_round() so agent's run_shell("python test.py") works.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove incremental update mode from download script

Incremental updates mix adjustment bases across ex-dividend boundaries,
making them unsafe for training data. Always use full download instead.

commit.message:
fix: resilient embedding job — handle Neon connection timeouts

- Add retry logic (2 retries with backoff) for connection errors
- Detect connection errors (timeout, reset, hang up) and self-chain
  to get fresh DB connection in new invocation
- Replace $transaction with concurrent Promise.all upserts to avoid
  holding a single connection open for entire batch
- Reduce time budget from 4min to 3min for safety margin
- Track progress in Redis (lastBatchAt, generated, remaining)
- Stats endpoint returns lastBatchAt for monitoring
- 3 consecutive connection failures → job stops with error state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add fallback sync detection + verbose ackCommand logging

command-status endpoint: if command is still "processing", checks
copier_accounts.last_synced as fallback — if the account was synced
after the command was created, returns "executed" even if the command
row hasn't been updated yet. This handles the case where VPS completes
the sync but ackCommand is slow or fails.

server.js: ackCommand now logs the full result, uses .select().single()
to verify the update worked, and logs success/failure explicitly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Admin menu: Listings, Not Yet Added, Analytics, Responses (removed Map)
- Fix createPinIcon missing zoom argument that broke Vercel deployment

commit.message:
Comply with engineering.md + philosophy: telemetry refactor, dead code removal, L5 integration

GameTelemetry architecture: target game core modules no longer print.
All telemetry stored in-memory via GameTelemetry dataclass (telemetry.py).
Callers (__main__.py, run_demo.py, GA) read telemetry and decide output.

L5 LocomotionTelemetry: fitness components (stability, grip, stride,
speed, turn) now sourced from Layer 5's sensor pipeline instead of
game-level computation.

Compliance fixes:
- Delete genome_loader.py (unreferenced deprecated file)
- Rename dwa_path_export.py → path_export.py (DWA removed)
- Remove deprecated --genome CLI arg and _current_waypoint
- Remove TURN_WZ (L5-owned parameter)
- path_critic.print_summary() → get_reports() (returns dict)
- game_scoring: all prints → GameTelemetry events/summary
- configure_for_robot() returns string instead of printing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(sw): bump cache v1→v2 + network-first CSS strategy

The service worker was serving stale cached CSS (sidebar.css, style.css)
with cache-first strategy. Even hard refresh couldn't bypass it.
This was the root cause of the sidebar nav items not showing on mobile.

- Bump CACHE_NAME to v2 (purges all v1 caches on activate)
- Switch CSS to network-first strategy (always fetch fresh, cache as fallback)
- Keep cache-first for images/fonts only (rarely change)
- Add sw.js to repo root (GitHub Pages serves root, not public/)
- Remove debug inline styles from sidebar nav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(ml): cap validation days at 20% of data span

With 75 days of data and VALIDATION_DAYS=30, the split was 57/43 —
far too little training data. The fixed 30-day window was designed for
2 years of data (30/730 = 4%), but kicks in at only 60 days.

Fix: cap validation at max(7, data_span * 20%) so it never exceeds 20%
of total data. Result with 75 days: 15d validation (~80/20 split).
With 2+ years: still 30 days (4%, unchanged).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(ui): replace hardcoded grays with theme tokens across all pages

Audit all pages for hardcoded gray/slate colors and replace with CSS
variable tokens (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted,
border-border, etc.) for proper light/dark mode support. Add ThemeToggle
to landing, login, and register pages. Add light mode overrides for
glass-card, btn-secondary, and card-hover components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: write lender/category directly to documents table instead of map tables

The map table approach failed because presigned URLs contain %20-encoded
spaces but decodeURIComponent produced literal spaces, so LIKE joins
never matched.

Now the PATCH endpoint does a simple UPDATE on the documents table
(which already has a category column, and lender will be added).
The bulk GET reads d.lender and d.category directly — no joins needed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Execution. Updates N4S_PHASES constant and getPhaseStatus refs.

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive security, data integrity, and code quality fixes

P0 Security:
- Add organizationId to all request update/delete where clauses (10 calls
  across 6 files) to prevent cross-org data access via race conditions
- Replace 42 unsafe `as any` casts with proper types (Prisma.InputJsonValue,
  typed interfaces, Record<string, unknown>) across 19 files

P1 Data Integrity:
- Wrap board creation duplicate-check + create in prisma.$transaction()
  to prevent race condition duplicates
- Add organizationId filter to reminderState, reportDefinition, and
  timeline queries (5 files) to prevent cross-org data access
- All findFirst/findUnique calls verified to have null checks (no fixes needed)
- All fire-and-forget async calls verified to have .catch() handlers (no fixes needed)

P2 Performance:
- Wrap carry-over-tasks bulk creation in transaction for atomicity
- Wrap generated-report viewer creation in transaction
- Add try-catch around board generation in GET /api/boards so generation
  failures don't prevent listing existing boards

P3 Tech Debt:
- Sanitize 6 API error responses that leaked Prisma error.code/error.meta
- Add TODO comment on debug user creation in signup route
- Add @@index([requestId, organizationId]) to ReminderState model

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add optimistic UI and injected message bubbles for chat

Use flushSync to render user messages instantly before IPC
serialization blocks the main thread. Injected messages sent
while the agent is streaming now appear as separate purple
user bubbles instead of inline markdown text within the
assistant's turn.

commit.message:
Move photo storage from localStorage to IndexedDB and fix stability issues

- Create IndexedDB-backed photoStore to handle base64 photos (hundreds of MB)
  instead of localStorage (5MB limit), fixing quota exceeded errors on import
- Strip base64 photos before saving trip to localStorage, reload from IndexedDB on mount
- Import handler: save photos to IndexedDB first, then stripped trip to localStorage
- Add try/catch on all localStorage operations and .catch() on async effects
- Fix white screen flickering caused by unhandled promise rejections
- Separate JSON parse errors from storage errors in import with better messages
- Simplify EditModal (fetchPlaceDetails now includes extras internally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Удалить Dockerfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(bocchi): batch 18 — enhanced guitar tone synthesis

Improve synthEngine with dual detuned oscillators (±3 cents) for chorus
width, decaying lowpass filter (bright attack → warm sustain), and
pluck attack noise burst simulating pick transient. Add ChordPlayMode:
'strum' (30ms delay), 'arpeggiate' (100ms), 'simultaneous'. Noise burst
is a 15ms decaying bandpass-filtered buffer for natural pluck feel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
